description: CompositionMustard round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% cotton, mustard fabric tape on the inseam of the neckline, vented hem, has graphic print on the front with a slightly distressed look Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water  Use mild detergent  Do not bleach  Avoid soaking  Remove immediately Line dry inside out in shade  Warm iron only  Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Declare your undying love for the iconic singer Freddie Mercury a.k.a. Farrokh Bulsara with this mustard   tee from tantra. Born to Indian parents in Zanzibar, Farrokh was nicknamed "Freddie" by his schoolmates. Team this cotton t-shirt with jeans, shorts or cargos for a perfectly casual look, and stay fresh and dry all day. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6', Shoulders-18"
